QF.id: XVI Clearing, Settlement and Risk Management_14

question.text: SEBI mandates that all exchange-accredited warehouses for commodity delivery must be:

answer.text: Registered with WDRA (Warehousing Development and Regulatory Authority)
Private warehouses without any regulatory oversight

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Only WDRA-accredited warehouses can be empanelled as WSPs by exchanges. WDRA registers each warehouse individually. At least one warehouse must be within 100 km of each delivery centre. **The Trap:** Exchanges don't own warehouses. They can be anywhere (not just Mumbai). Regulatory oversight IS required. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VI covers warehouse/depository regulation. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** WDRA accreditation ensures quality and safety standards — this is critical for commodity buyers relying on warehouse receipts for delivery settlement.
